mapper.select: SELECT v.vehicle_id, v.license_plate, v.line_id, v.model, v.purchase_time, v.status, l.line_name FROM vehicle v LEFT JOIN line l ON v.line_id = l.line_id WHERE v.vehicle_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vehicle (license_plate, line_id, model, purchase_time, status) VALUES (#{licensePlate}, #{lineId}, #{model}, #{purchaseTime}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT v.vehicle_id, v.license_plate, v.line_id, v.model, v.purchase_time, v.status, l.line_name FROM vehicle v LEFT JOIN line l ON v.line_id = l.line_id
SELECT v.vehicle_id, v.license_plate, v.line_id, v.model, v.purchase_time, v.status, l.line_name FROM vehicle v LEFT JOIN line l ON v.line_id = l.line_id WHERE v.line_id = #{lineId}
